site.tagline: Over 18 Years of Unwavering Trust & Excellence in Banking and Real Estate Advisory.

hero.subtext: Guided by 18+ years of industry experience to help you secure luxury residences and premium investments across India and Dubai.

about.name: George Cherian
about.title: Founder – Prime Trust Realtor
paragraphs: George Cherian is a seasoned professional with over 18 years of experience in banking, leadership, sales, and customer relationship management. After building a successful career in the financial sector, he brings his strong expertise in client advisory, negotiation, and strategic planning into the real estate industry.

As the Founder of Prime Trust Realtor, George specializes in helping clients buy, sell, and invest in residential properties across Mumbai, particularly in premium developments such as JP North and surrounding areas up to South Mumbai.

His strong financial background allows him to guide clients with transparent advice, market insights, and the best value deals within their budget. George believes that buying a property is one of the most important decisions in life.

With a deep understanding of property valuation, negotiation, documentation, and market trends, George works closely with buyers, sellers, and investors to create win-win opportunities in the real estate market.
about.quote: Prime Trust Realtor is committed to delivering reliable property solutions with integrity, transparency, and dedication.

featured_properties.title: Signature Marina Penthouse
featured_properties.description: Experience unparalleled luxury in this sprawling full-floor penthouse featuring 360-degree views of the Dubai skyline.
featured_properties.whatsapp_message: Hello George, I am very interested in the 'Signature Marina Penthouse' property listed on your website. Could we connect to discuss further?

featured_properties.title: Sea-Facing Luxury Estate
featured_properties.description: A rare, ultra-premium independent estate in the heart of Bandra offering expansive ocean views and home automation.
featured_properties.whatsapp_message: Hi George, I am interested in the 'Sea-Facing Luxury Estate' property in Mumbai. Could we have a quick chat about it?

vehicles.title: Mercedes-Benz S-Class
vehicles.description: Immaculate condition, chauffeur-driven, zero depreciation insurance valid till year-end.
